Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Kit for Outdoor Business Advertising

The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Kit provides professional outdoor advertising with durable hardware and two vibrant 36" x 24" full-color signs. This weather-resistant plastic A-frame features maximum stability for sidewalk and storefront displays.

Each kit includes molded handles for easy transport, making setup and relocation effortless for daily business use. The maintenance-free design withstands outdoor conditions while displaying your custom double-sided printed signage.

A-Frame Kit Features

  • Durable black plastic A-frame hardware
  • Two 36" x 24" custom Coroplast signs included
  • Weather-resistant construction for outdoor use
  • Molded handles for easy portability
  • Maximum stability design prevents tipping
  • Maintenance-free plastic construction

Professional Signage Applications

  • Storefront sidewalk advertising
  • Restaurant menu displays
  • Real estate open house signs
  • Event and promotion announcements
  • Directional business signage
  • Temporary outdoor advertising
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Coroplast Sign Material for Outdoor A-Frame Displays

A-Frame Material Specifications

The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame features professional-grade plastic construction designed for outdoor commercial use. Each kit includes durable 4mm Coroplast signs that resist weather damage and maintain vibrant colors.

Coroplast Sign Benefits

  • 4mm Thickness: Provides durability while remaining lightweight
  • Weather Resistant: Withstands rain, UV exposure, and wind
  • Full-Color Printing: Vibrant graphics that won't fade quickly
  • Recyclable Material: Environmentally responsible signage option

A-Frame Hardware Features

  • Black Plastic Construction: Professional appearance and durability
  • Molded Handles: Easy transport and positioning
  • Stable Base Design: Prevents tipping in moderate wind
  • Maintenance-Free: No painting or refinishing required

The combination of durable Coroplast signage and stable plastic hardware creates a professional advertising solution suitable for daily outdoor business use.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Finishing Options for Professional Display

Sign Finishing Specifications

Each A-Frame sign receives professional finishing to ensure optimal outdoor performance and visual appeal for your business advertising needs.

Standard Finishing Process

  • Full-Color Digital Printing: High-resolution graphics on both signs
  • UV-Resistant Inks: Extended outdoor color retention
  • Precision Cutting: Exact 36" x 24" dimensions for perfect fit
  • Corner Radius Options: Rounded corners available upon request

Double-Sided Printing

  • Front and Back Graphics: Maximum advertising visibility
  • Independent Designs: Different artwork on each side if desired
  • Professional Mounting: Signs fit securely in A-frame slots
  • Easy Replacement: Signs can be updated without new hardware

Quality Assurance

  • Color accuracy verification before printing
  • Material inspection for defects
  • Proper curing time for ink adhesion
  • Final quality check before shipping
PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom A-Frame Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Production Time Options

Professional A-Frame sign production includes artwork processing, digital printing, finishing, and quality inspection. Production times begin after artwork approval and payment confirmation.

Express Production: 2 Business Days

  • Priority processing for urgent business needs
  • Expedited artwork review and approval
  • Fast-track printing and finishing
  • Available for standard template designs
  • Express shipping options available

Standard Production: 3 Business Days

  • Most popular production timeframe
  • Full artwork customization available
  • Complete quality inspection included
  • Suitable for most business timelines
  • Standard and expedited shipping available

Economy Production: 5 Business Days

  • Cost-effective option for advance planning
  • Full customization and design services
  • Extended quality assurance process
  • Perfect for non-urgent projects
  • All shipping methods available

Note: Production times do not include shipping. Weekend and holiday production may be limited. Rush orders may require additional fees.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Payment & Ordering Options

Secure Payment Methods

Multiple payment options are available for your A-Frame sign order, with secure processing and immediate order confirmation upon payment approval.

Credit Card Payments

  • Accepted Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Secure Processing: SSL encryption for transaction safety
  • Immediate Processing: Orders enter production quickly
  • Payment Confirmation: Instant email receipt provided

Business Payment Options

  • Purchase Orders: Net 30 terms for approved business accounts
  • Corporate Accounts: Established credit terms available
  • Bulk Order Discounts: Volume pricing for multiple units
  • Repeat Customer Benefits: Streamlined ordering process

Order Processing

  • Payment verification before production begins
  • Order confirmation email with tracking details
  • Production updates via email notifications
  • Shipping notification with tracking information

All payments are processed securely with industry-standard encryption. Business accounts may qualify for extended payment terms upon credit approval.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for A-Frame Sign Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines

A-Frame sign kits are carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit. The plastic hardware and Coroplast signs are protected with appropriate packaging materials for safe delivery.

Packaging Specifications

  • A-Frame Hardware: Wrapped in protective film and foam padding
  • Coroplast Signs: Flat-packed between protective cardboard
  • Assembly Instructions: Included with every shipment
  • Damage Protection: Insured shipping available

Available Shipping Methods

Ground Shipping

  • Standard Ground: 3-7 business days delivery
  • Expedited Ground: 1-3 business days delivery
  • Freight Options: Available for bulk orders
  • Tracking Included: Monitor shipment progress online

Express Shipping

  • Overnight Delivery: Next business day arrival
  • Two-Day Express: Second business day delivery
  • Saturday Delivery: Available in most areas
  • Signature Required: Secure delivery confirmation

Delivery Considerations

  • Residential delivery surcharges may apply
  • Large orders may require freight shipping
  • Weather delays possible in extreme conditions
  • PO Box delivery not available for A-Frame hardware
PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Uses for A-Frame Sidewalk Signs

Business Advertising Applications

The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Kit serves multiple professional advertising needs, providing portable and effective outdoor signage for various business applications.

Retail and Storefront Uses

  • Daily Specials: Restaurant menu highlights and promotions
  • Store Hours: Business operation times and contact information
  • Sale Announcements: Seasonal promotions and clearance events
  • New Product Launches: Feature latest merchandise and services
  • Directional Signage: Guide customers to entrances and parking

Professional Services

  • Real Estate: Open house schedules and property features
  • Healthcare: Office hours, services, and appointment reminders
  • Legal Services: Practice areas and consultation availability
  • Financial Services: Interest rates, services, and office information

Event and Temporary Signage

  • Trade Shows: Booth identification and service highlights
  • Farmers Markets: Product listings and vendor information
  • Construction Sites: Safety messages and project information
  • Community Events: Registration, directions, and schedules

Seasonal Applications

  • Holiday hours and special events
  • Weather-related business updates
  • Seasonal service announcements
  • Emergency contact information
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Artwork File Guidelines

Professional A-Frame sign printing requires properly prepared artwork files to ensure optimal print quality and accurate color reproduction on your custom signage.

File Format Requirements

  • Preferred Formats: PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution PSD
  • Image Resolution: 150 DPI minimum at actual print size
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color printing
  • File Size: Under 100MB for standard processing

Design Specifications

  • Sign Dimensions: 36" x 24" finished size
  • Bleed Area: 0.125" bleed on all sides recommended
  • Safe Zone: Keep important text 0.25" from edges
  • Font Requirements: Outline all fonts or provide font files

Order Proof Process

Artwork Review Steps

  • Initial Review: Technical specifications verification
  • Digital Proof: Email proof sent for customer approval
  • Revision Options: Up to 3 minor revisions included
  • Final Approval: Customer sign-off required before printing

Color Match Proof System

Color Accuracy Options

  • Standard Color: Professional color matching included
  • Pantone Colors: Specific color matching available
  • Hard Proof: Physical color proof available upon request
  • Color Calibration: Monitor display may vary from actual print

Design Services: Professional design assistance available for customers who need artwork creation or modification services.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom A-Frame Sign Kit Today

Get professional outdoor advertising with the Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Kit. Each kit includes durable plastic hardware and two custom 36" x 24" Coroplast signs designed for your business needs.

Ready to Get Started?

Choose from our template library or upload your custom artwork to create professional A-Frame signage that attracts customers and promotes your business effectively.

Two Easy Options:

Upload Your Print-Ready File: Have artwork ready? Upload your design files and we'll handle the professional printing and assembly.

Let Our Designers Help: Need design assistance? Our professional design team can create custom artwork that effectively promotes your business message.

Why Choose Our A-Frame Signs?

  • Professional-grade materials and construction
  • Fast turnaround times starting at 2 business days
  • Weather-resistant outdoor performance
  • Easy setup and portable design
  • Competitive pricing with volume discounts
  • Expert customer service and support

Contact our customer service team for custom double-sided printing options or bulk order pricing. We're here to help create the perfect outdoor advertising solution for your business.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

How durable is the Black Signicade A-Frame hardware?

The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame is constructed from high-quality plastic designed for outdoor commercial use. It features weather-resistant construction that withstands rain, wind, and UV exposure while maintaining structural integrity.

Can I get different artwork on each side of the signs?

Yes, you can have completely different designs printed on the front and back of each Coroplast sign. This allows maximum flexibility for your advertising message and seasonal promotions.

How easy is it to change the signs in the A-Frame?

The signs slide easily into the A-Frame slots and can be removed and replaced quickly. This allows you to update your messaging, promote seasonal offers, or use different signs for various events without purchasing new hardware.

What file formats do you accept for custom artwork?

We accept PDF, AI, EPS, and high-resolution PSD files. Images should be 150 DPI minimum at actual print size (36" x 24") and provided in CMYK color mode for accurate printing results.

How stable is the A-Frame in windy conditions?

The Signicade Deluxe features a wide, stable base design that resists tipping in moderate wind conditions. For extremely windy areas, we recommend bringing signs indoors or using additional weights for enhanced stability.

Can I order additional signs without purchasing new hardware?

Yes, replacement signs can be ordered separately once you have the A-Frame hardware. This is cost-effective for businesses that want to rotate messages or update signage regularly.

What's the maximum quantity I can order?

You can order up to 1000 A-Frame kits per order. Volume discounts are available for larger quantities, and our customer service team can assist with bulk pricing and shipping arrangements.

Do you offer design services if I don't have artwork?

Yes, our professional design team can create custom artwork for your A-Frame signs. Design services include layout creation, text formatting, image integration, and color optimization for professional results.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
